# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No correctness or robustness issues were identified in source logic from the requested review scope. The current diff shows no code changes in the run-lifecycle implementation files (`src/adapters/fs.rs`, `src/cli/run.rs`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`); it only touches `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm/run.json` metadata files.

## Amendments

None.
